description: Singular vs plural, collective nouns, quantifiers

rules.rule: Singular subjects take singular verbs; plural subjects take plural verbs.
rules.example: The student studies hard. The students study hard.
rules.ielts_usage: Subject-verb agreement errors are penalized in Writing and Speaking.

medium: The research methodology incorporates multiple data sources.
ielts: Government investment in renewable energy sources reduces carbon emissions significantly.
Public awareness campaigns about environmental issues have increased in recent years.
academic: The theoretical framework underpinning this study derives from constructivist epistemology.
Methodological considerations in qualitative research include researcher reflexivity and ethical protocols.

common_mistakes.incorrect: The list of items are on the table.
common_mistakes.correct: The list of items is on the table.
